columns.name: Iordre12
columns.description: The first 12 characters of the order identifier

columns.name: DistrAvd
columns.description: Code for the distribution area

columns.name: OrdrekL
columns.description: The type of order (e.g., sales, purchase)

columns.name: Sendspr
columns.description: Indicates the sending preference or mode

columns.name: OsketLevdato
columns.description: The desired delivery date for the order

columns.name: Ordredato
columns.description: The date when the order was placed

columns.name: Innkjoper
columns.description: The code for the importer or purchasing entity

columns.name: Referanse
columns.description: A reference string used to identify the order

columns.name: Varemottaker
columns.description: The name or identifier of the person receiving the goods

columns.name: Vmadresse2
columns.description: The second line of the recipient's address

columns.name: Vmpostnr
columns.description: The postal code of the recipient’s address

columns.name: Vmpoststed
columns.description: The city or town where the recipient is located

columns.name: Samlet
columns.description: Indicates whether all items have been processed in the order

columns.name: Packing
columns.description: The type of packaging used for the goods

columns.name: EanLokasjon
columns.description: The location code within an EAN system

columns.name: EanAvsender
columns.description: The EAN code of the sender or provider

columns.name: SendsTekst
columns.description: Additional text related to the sending of goods or documents

columns.name: LevBet
columns.description: The preferred delivery date for the order

columns.name: LevBetTektst
columns.description: Additional text related to the delivery preference

columns.name: OsketLevdato
columns.description: The second desired delivery date for the order (possibly used internally)

columns.name: SisteLevdato
columns.description: The last delivery date recorded in the system

columns.name: Kontraktnr
columns.description: The number of the contract associated with the order (possibly used internally)

columns.name: Selgerid
columns.description: The identifier for the salesperson responsible for the order
